title: Hotels In Santa Fe New Mexico - Piñon Court
details: Enjoy Southwestern charm at Piñon Court, a boutique hotel among hotels in Santa Fe New Mexico, near the historic plaza, with spacious rooms and local

feature.f1: Custom Theme Development: Handcrafted WordPress theme built from scratch using clean PHP and modular CSS for maximum performance.
feature.f2: Dynamic Room Management: Implemented Advanced Custom Fields (ACF) for high-end management of room types, amenities, and seasonal pricing.
feature.f3: SEO & Schema Integration: Implemented Hotel Schema markup and local SEO best practices to improve search engine visibility and direct organic bookings.
feature.f4: Bloat-free Performance: Achieved superior loading speeds by avoiding page builders, resulting in a lightweight DOM and 95+ Core Web Vitals score.
feature.f5: Mobile-First Architecture: Fully responsive, handcrafted layout designed specifically to provide a premium booking experience on mobile devices.

Technologies: WordPress, PHP, JavaScript, CSS3/SCSS, ACF (Advanced Custom Fields), REST API, MySQL

title: Hospitality Development - Hyatt Brand Portfolio
details: Developed this high-end hospitality platform for The Barnett, a luxury boutique hotel in New Orleans’ Warehouse District. I transformed their sophisticated brand identity into a pixel-perfect digital experience, focusing on showcasing their musical heritage, five signature dining destinations, and high-conversion booking flows.

feature.f1: Luxury responsive UI built with Elementor Pro.
feature.f2: Custom ACF backend for room and dining management.
feature.f3: Technical SEO optimization for hospitality markets.
feature.f4: Dynamic event spaces with integrated inquiry CTAs.
feature.f5: Full web accessibility and screen reader support.

Technologies: WordPress, Elementor Pro, ACF (Advanced Custom Fields), JavaScript, Technical SEO, Google Maps API

title: E-Learning Platform
details: Skill Edge is an E-learning website where you can purchase any course to improve skills.

feature.f1: The Website is fully responsive using bootstrap
feature.f2: Any users can log in and purchase a course.
feature.f3: It also comes with a modern UI design with both dark and light modes.
feature.f4: Without login a user can't enters to the checkout and user profile pages.
feature.f5: You can update your profile information from profile section.

title: Appoinment Management Web App
details: AnyCare is a pet appointment scheduling website where you can schedule a appointment to experts.

feature.f1: The Website is fully responsive using tailwind.
feature.f2: Visitors need to be login for appoinment schedule .
feature.f3: After booked a Schedule, User can cancel or reschedule it.
feature.f4: There's an admin panel where admin can manage users and all the appoinments.
feature.f5: Admin can make any user to admin.
